flags.showOnPublicCardPage: May appear on public card meaning pages.
flags.useInDailyPuzzle: May be used in daily puzzle tools.
flags.useInEmail: May be used in email content.
flags.useInPaidTraining: May be used in paid training or member materials.
flags.useAsInternalAiSourceMaterial: May be used by Leigh Spencer as structured source material inside internal AI-assisted workflows. This does not license the content for external AI training, public scraping, outside reuse, or third-party extraction.
flags.useInPairingSystem: May be referenced by the separate pairing system, but exact pair meanings must remain outside the single-card record.
flags.requiresReviewBeforePublication: Must be reviewed before public use.
flags.containsCulturallySpecificMaterial: Contains material that may require cultural or specialist review.
flags.containsTranslationMaterial: Contains language translation or language-learning material.
